rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Solarmarker File Extension Registry Key Set

rules.rule_text:
title: Solarmarker File Extension Registry Key Set
id: 57c4dca5-51cd-4cff-b835-d7eebe8e92f6
related:
- id: 7530b96f-ad8e-431d-a04d-ac85cc461fdc
  type: similar
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of suspicious file extension registry key. This extension
  is then registered with a custom file type (see Detail component of detection below)
  with a malicious powershell payload specified.
references:
- https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2022/02/01/solarmarker-campaign-used-novel-registry-changes-to-establish-persistence/
- https://www.esentire.com/blog/esentire-threat-intelligence-malware-analysis-solarmarker
- https://www.elastic.co/security-labs/going-coast-to-coast-climbing-the-pyramid-with-the-deimos-implant
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/09
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1202
logsource:
  category: registry_set
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    EventType: SetValue
    TargetObject|re: ^.*\\.([a-zA-Z]){13,18}$
    Detail|re: ^.*([a-z]){18,22}$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
